submitted_payload.suggested_entry: Ralph Workflow — free open-source workflow layer for autonomous coding that composes planning, implementation, and verification into a reviewable repo-native flow.

why_this_action: Shared artifacts still show distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck, Apollo is already in a measurement window until 2026-05-30, Reddit remains structurally blocked/high-risk, and AgentDepot exposes a live email intake on a highly aligned coding-agent directory with no logged prior Ralph Workflow outreach. That makes it a stronger executable fresh lane than more prep-only curator work.
shared_findings_reused: MARKETING_WORKFLOW_PRINCIPLES.md: prioritize Codeberg-first distribution and proof-led positioning
FOUR_MARKETING_QUESTIONS.md: preserved what it is, who it is for, why different, why now
ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: bias toward free-use path and proof-led conversion instead of more generic posting
market_intelligence_latest.json: reused positioning truths and comparison-aware framing
channel_discovery.json: AgentDepot submit page exposes a live email handoff surface

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, listing inclusion, or a live AgentDepot citation/backlink pointing evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or listing signal arrives by 2026-06-06, replace this lane with a different untouched curator/directory target instead of re-sending the same pitch.
